## Summary

- What changed?
- Why does it matter?

## Scope

- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] GitHub / CI / Repo config

## Validation

- [ ] Backend import / compile check
- [ ] Frontend build
- [ ] Manual smoke test when relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Docs updated when behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets or local artifacts added
